{{Infobox location
| name = Ruins
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Ruins Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] are massive, ancient structures built by legendary masters that predated current [[sacred artists]]. Appearing as a colossal [[pyramid]] or mountain of stacked brown stone, the ruins can reach into the clouds and dwarf everything in their vicinity. These structures are characterized as dark, deadly labyrinths filled with ancient secrets and immense power. A primary attraction within the ruins is a highly sought-after spear, a weapon capable of elevating a faction to celestial heights. The ruins possess the ability to draw [[vital aura]] from hundreds of miles around, a process that can leave the surrounding environment dim. This concentration of energy makes the interior extremely dangerous, as it is densely populated by [[dreadbeasts]] and [[Remnants]]. The architecture itself is unique, featuring streets that wind through hollowed-out bones and structures like skulls or claws repurposed into buildings. Following the opening of a [[Soulsmith foundry]] at its summit, the ruins reached an equilibrium, drawing [[aura]] from its immediate surroundings rather than the distant horizon. The sudden emergence of these ruins from the ground led to the formation of the [[Five Factions Alliance]], a makeshift encampment of shops and shacks built at the base of the structure to support those seeking its treasures.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Ruins serve as a site for excursions where the School's High [[Elder]] requires the presence of [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]]. This location is filled with tunnels, thick [[vital aura]], and numerous [[Remnants]] and [[dreadbeasts]]. Within the area, an enormous block can sink into a wall, and script can be found written upon the surfaces. [[Eithan]], who claims the area as if it were his own home, has previously scrounged [[sacred beasts]] from the site. The Ruins contain a [[script-circle]] capable of detonating the [[Transcendent Ruins]], and the [[First Fisher]] intends to clean the area out so that its contents can be catalogued.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] is a location where the School's High [[Elder]] needs [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] is a location containing tunnels.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] contain thick [[vital aura]] and many [[Remnants]] and [[dreadbeasts]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] is a location where an enormous block can sink into the wall.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] are a location where excursions take place.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] claims the [[Ruins]] may as well be his own home.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] contain a script on the walls.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] is a location that the [[First Fisher]] intends to clean out.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] contain [[dreadbeasts]] and [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] scrounged [[sacred beasts]] from the [[Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] contain a [[script-circle]] that could detonate the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Ruins]] contain contents that must be catalogued.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] fought [[Jai Long]] in the [[Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“These Ruins may as well be my own home.”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
